Aldin Halilović

Frontend Developer

Portfolio

Challenges are not obstacles
they're chances to innovate.

Hello! I'm Aldin, a dedicated frontend developer who not only loves the art of coding but thrives on solving complex problems. For me, the world of web development isn't just a job; it's a captivating journey where each line of code is an opportunity to create something truly exceptional.

In the dynamic realm of technology, I'm a firm believer in continuous learning. It's not just a decision to stay up to date with emerging trends and technologies, it's a commitment to providing innovative solutions. Making progress is essential, not just encouraged. I'm constantly trying to get better, whether it's by learning new technologies or honing my current skills.

Copyright © Aldin Halilović

Junior Frontend Developer

At NetPlus, my work focuses on creating modern, functional, and aesthetically appealing websites. I utilize advanced technologies, specifically React for front-end and React Native for mobile development. These tools enable me to provide unique and personalized solutions for our clients.

Key Aspects of My Work

  • React and React Native: I base my skills on React and React Native technologies to ensure an optimal user experience on both the web and mobile devices.
  • Adaptable Templates: I design template websites that are adaptable to various client needs. My approach is directed towards quick implementation while maintaining a high level of customization.
  • Design Innovation: I actively approach design with innovative ideas to enhance the visual aspect of every project.
  • Performance and Optimization: I am dedicated to optimizing performance, loading speed, and responsiveness of every website and mobile application I develop.

Constructorly

In my role at this innovative startup, I took charge of the entire front-end development using React Native. The primary goal was to create a powerful mobile application catering to the specific needs of construction firms. This app serves as a comprehensive management tool, enabling companies to monitor all aspects of their projects, track workforce activities, generate detailed reports, and much more.

Key Aspects of My Work

  • React Native Development: As the sole front-end developer, I leveraged React Native to build a robust and efficient mobile application.
  • Comprehensive Project Tracking: I played a pivotal role in implementing features that allow construction companies to track every detail of their projects in real-time.
  • Workforce Management: The app includes functionalities for monitoring and managing the workforce, ensuring optimal efficiency on construction sites.
  • Custom Reporting System: I designed and implemented a custom reporting system, providing insightful data to aid decision-making processes.
  • Intuitive User Interface: Focused on creating an intuitive user interface to enhance the user experience and make the app user-friendly for individuals at all technical levels.

Centar Nit

In my position at Centar Nit, I lead an immersive 9-month coding course tailored for individuals aged 16 to 25. The program is divided into three cycles, each spanning three months and covering essential aspects of web development.

  • HTML and CSS (First Cycle):
    During the initial cycle, students delve into the fundamentals of web development, gaining proficiency in HTML and CSS. This foundational knowledge sets the stage for understanding web page structure and styling, establishing a strong basis for their coding journey.
  • JavaScript (Second Cycle):
    Building on the basics, the second cycle focuses on JavaScript and Algorithms. Students engage in hands-on experiences with dynamic scripting, enhancing their ability to create interactive and engaging web applications.
  • React (Third Cycle):
    The final cycle centers around React, a powerful JavaScript library for building user interfaces. Students learn to develop sophisticated and responsive web applications, solidifying their expertise in front-end development with their own projects.

  • Nurturing Tomorrow's Developers:
    My role at Centar Nit extends beyond teaching code. It's about cultivating a community of passionate learners eager to innovate and make a positive impact in the tech world. Together, we explore the dynamic landscape of web development, preparing students for exciting opportunities ahead.
